three_layer_positioning.layer_1_memory: Loom OS spans this — knowledge graph (Graphify AST + LLM extractors), vector search (sentence-transformers), temporal facts, recall engine
three_layer_positioning.layer_2_orchestration: Loom OS spans this — 6-agent worker registry, WorkerSupervisor, task board with dependency DAG, git worktree isolation, budget-capped execution
three_layer_positioning.layer_3_dashboard: Loom OS spans this — Next.js 16 dashboard, Cytoscape graph explorer, Kanban board, agent directory, dispatch modal
three_layer_positioning.unique_span: Loom OS is the ONLY tool that spans all three layers. Every competitor is confined to 1-2 layers.

competitors.name: Cognee
competitors.architecture: Pipeline-based ingestion with extractors, classifiers, resolvers. Neo4j (graph) + PGVector (vectors) + Qdrant (additional vectors). Self-hosted (Docker) or cloud.
competitors.integration_surface: Python SDK — agents call cognee.add() / cognee.search() programmatically
competitors.deployment: Docker Compose with Neo4j + PostgreSQL + Qdrant containers. Heavy infrastructure.
key_strengths: Multi-modal retrieval: graph + vector + relational in one query
key_limitations: Requires Docker + Neo4j + PostgreSQL + Qdrant — heavy infra
No filesystem inbox protocol — requires SDK integration
No task dispatch or worker execution

competitors.name: Graphiti / Zep
competitors.architecture: Temporal knowledge graph — edges and nodes have time dimensions. Bi-temporal model with Neo4j backend. Tracks what changed between sessions.
key_strengths: Bi-temporal graph model — first-class time-dimensioned queries
Real-time graph updates as agents learn

competitors.name: MCP Memory Server
competitors.architecture: Official MCP server. Knowledge graph-based persistent memory. Filesystem-backed JSON storage. Entity-relationship model.
competitors.integration_surface: MCP protocol (stdio/HTTP) — works with Claude Desktop, Cursor, Cline, any MCP client
competitors.deployment: Zero-config — runs as a subprocess of the MCP client
key_limitations: Simple entity model — not a code knowledge graph

competitors.name: Mem0
competitors.architecture: AI memory layer for personalization. Continuously learns from user interactions. Cloud-first with self-hosted option. Focuses on user preference memory.
key_strengths: Multi-platform SDKs (Python, JS, LangChain, AutoGen, CrewAI adapters)
key_limitations: Different use case — user personalization, not code knowledge

competitors.name: Letta (MemGPT)
competitors.architecture: Stateful agents with OS-inspired tiered memory (working memory + archival storage + recall memory). Agent-level memory management.
competitors.integration_surface: Python SDK + REST API + visual dev interface
key_limitations: No shared knowledge graph between agents

competitors.name: Cloudflare Agent Memory
competitors.architecture: Stateful AI agents with persistent memory on Cloudflare's edge. WebSocket support, scheduled tasks. Cloud-only SDK.
key_limitations: Cloud-only — opposite philosophy to Loom's local-first daemon

competitors.name: Claude Code sub-agents
competitors.architecture: Hierarchical delegation — main agent spawns sub-agents for focused tasks. Each sub-agent gets isolated context. No shared memory between sub-agents.
key_limitations: No shared memory between sub-agents — each starts fresh

competitors.name: GitHub Spec Kit
competitors.architecture: Spec-driven agent coding — write specs, agents implement. Task decomposition from structured specifications.
key_limitations: Spec-only — no memory or learning from results

competitors.name: Swarms
competitors.architecture: Multi-agent framework — swarm-based agent coordination. Multiple agent topologies (sequential, parallel, hierarchical).
key_limitations: No knowledge graph — no shared memory

competitors.name: LangGraph Studio
competitors.architecture: Visual agent debugging — trace agent execution, inspect state, debug graphs. Companion to LangGraph orchestration framework.
competitors.integration_surface: Desktop app — connects to LangGraph projects

method_notes.source: Knowledge bank (ai-agent-memory-landscape.md, dated 2026-06-26) + direct codebase read (2026-06-30)

method_notes.codebase_verification: All Loom OS feature claims verified by reading source code: 30 daemon modules, 6,644 LOC, 46 API routes, 27 test files.
